name: Backend Service & Background Work
description: 后端服务:后台任务、队列与定时调度

detector.inline: profile.code_domains.some(d=>['backend_service','service','queue','job','scheduler'].includes(d)) || profile.repo_signals.some(s=>/\b(service layer|job queue|background (job|worker|task)|task queue|message queue|(worker|consumer) (pool|process|thread)|scheduler|idempotenc|retry (logic|policy|with backoff)|exponential backoff|graceful shutdown|dead letter)\b|后台(任务|作业)|任务队列|消息队列/i.test(s)) ? 0.9 : 0
